title: Mythic Metals (Trimmable Tools Compat)
description: Changes the textures of the tools added by Mythic Metals to be more compatible with Trimmable Tools.
body: This changes some of the textures of tools added in mythic metals to be more compatible with trimmable tools. These changes range from simply moving the textures to a different position, to altering them so that they fit most if not all trims. About half the textures needed to be repositioned. ALL Double sided axes were altered to become single sided. Some Hoes had to be altered significantly in order to fit. two or three shovels required alterations more significant than simple repositioning. two or three swords were altered but more need to be looked at.
